entry.title: damian’s in his feelings (and he can’t get out of it)
entry.summary:
Author: melesdots

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,112Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 30

Summary: Damian Wayne had a heart of gold. His hands were gentle, his voice soft, his arms aching to wrap around somebody. Yet, he was convinced love was something he could never have. Perhaps it was a consequence of his childhood, or maybe he was right: everyone he loved was bound to leave him eventually. His siblings seemed to have an easier time with matters of the heart, and were determined to show him it was not the minefield he imagined after he grew the courage to ask for help. Of course, despite their efforts, the only one who could make him see he is deserving of it was you.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: What We Inherit
entry.summary:
Author: pugcasket

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,329Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 21

Summary: "Take off the suit and fight me properly." "Take off the brooding and maybe i will." When the children of Tony Stark and Bruce Wayne are forced onto the same battlefield, the world collides. You build. He was built. And some rivals are harder to ignore than they should be.

entry.summary:

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 163,365Chapters: 31/?Kudos: 3,282

entry.title: Ecantu dignoscitur avis ( you’ll know the bird by its song )
entry.summary:
Author: Hellofromsomewhere

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,145Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 9

Summary: Damian knew something was wrong the moment his mother had left him in the dreary and ridiculed streets of Gotham . As he was made to stand infront of the man known as the bat -“ A warrior , who was worthy” , his mother told him , “A soldier , His father” . Damian had heard the songs of his praises , which rang through their sacred halls , yet himself knew the man only as a stranger.-At a crossroad what path will Damian choose

entry.title: It's Only Love, Nobody Dies
entry.summary:
Author: vivid_dreamer7

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,215Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 31

Summary: Meeting at the age of 6, you and Damian have been inseperable since… much to his feigned displeasure. Now, 12 years later, adulthood is hitting you and being a senior in high school is kicking your ass. On top of that, hook-up culture has gone mainstream leaving you with an extreme case of FOMO. 18 and still haven't had our first kiss? Not on your watch. And who better to ask to have your first kiss with than your best friend who is also inexperienced? It's only one kiss. … Right? ~Join our hormonal teens as they navigate a world neither of them truly understand: romance and healthy relationships. Will they be able to get out of this hellhole they both jumped headfirst in? Or will this decision ruin their friendship forever?~

entry.title: Beware the Nightmares on the Land and Sea
entry.summary:
Author: HotaruKurosawa

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 180,760Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 196

Summary: One day, your life took a turn. For better or worse, you haven't decided yet. What you do know is that there are things on this planet that you never even knew existed. Things that your mind could never even imagine. Yet, here you are. Now, you must rebuild your life whilst trying to navigate this new one involving heroes and villains alike. Not to mention navigating the normal world and the magic one, as you possess a power that others could only dream of having. Whilst you are uncertain of how to navigate these changes in your life, these few things are certain. Don't go into the water past your knees.If you saw something that seemed abnormal, no you didn't.If you hear voices in your head, it will pass. Don't fully trust their advice.No matter what you do with your life, remember, it's not just yours that hangs in the balance.And lastly, whatever you do, don't have sex. These are the things you have to follow by to get through this life. If you don't, it won't be just you who deals with the consequences. Oh, and don't forget. The Eldritch Being inside of your chest is watching everything you do. Try not to disappoint her. Your Choices Matter.

entry.title: And whatever souls are made of (ours are made of the same)
entry.summary:
Author: thenyoumightaswellwrestleangels

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,598Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 38

Summary: "There doesn't have to be anything wrong," Damian says slowly, and you wonder when he had to become so careful with you. You wonder if loving someone means treating them like glass - and maybe that's why you're so bad at it. "But if there is, I'd rather know." "To what end?" you ask softly. "So that I can know you again, the way I did before I loved you."
